title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt; David Thomas
synopsis: A classic guide to software craftsmanship, full of practical tips for writing better code and growing as a developer.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
synopsis: A sweeping look at how Homo sapiens came to dominate the planet, from the cognitive revolution to the present day.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
synopsis: A young shepherd travels in search of treasure and discovers the wisdom of listening to his heart.
